text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Now I can relax and watch some wrestling!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... But I feel like I'm forgetting something
important...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I can't remember what it is, though...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Eh, it's probably just my imagination!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Anyway... What kind of aerial moves are we
gonna see this time...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, El Condor Pasa accidentally misses
training.
